name: GIANTS-1 immune-aging biomarker registry
summary: A small recruiting phase 2a registry testing GI-102 plus GIB-7 in healthy adults and cancer survivors, with immune-cell, safety, physical-function, cognition, microbiome, and health-event endpoints.
population: Healthy adults and cancer survivors aged 18 to 80 years

trial_details.horizon_note: ClinicalTrials.gov listed the trial as recruiting with no posted results in the June 11, 2026 API view.
trial_details.why_it_matters: The registry is directly relevant to Immune Rejuvenation because it prospectively measures NK cells, CD8 T cells, safety, physical function, health events, cognition, and microbiome endpoints, but it cannot support benefit until results are posted.
